# Hermes Agent Vendor Source

Spider_XHS vendors `NousResearch/hermes-agent` for its background memory substrate.

- Repository: https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent
- Commit: `98d75dea5a86aec599b1e081f8bbe9170bd3f964`
- Version declared by upstream at this commit: `hermes-agent 0.11.0`
- License: MIT, preserved in `vendor/hermes-agent/LICENSE`

Spider_XHS integrates Hermes through a local adapter in `hermes_runtime.py` and does not modify the vendored upstream source.
